key.name: recording-duration
key.description: Maximum recording duration in seconds (10 seconds to 5 minutes)

key.name: copy-to-clipboard
key.description: Copy transcribed text to clipboard in addition to typing it

key.name: skip-preview-x11
key.description: If enabled (X11 only), the extension will insert the transcribed text immediately after recording, without showing the preview dialog. Has no effect on Wayland.

key.name: non-blocking-transcription
key.description: If enabled, the extension will show a small non-blocking “Transcribing…” window while processing your audio, so you can keep using your computer. A notification will be shown when transcription finishes.

key.name: remote-enabled
key.description: If enabled, the local Speech2Text service will forward audio to a remote HTTP server instead of running Whisper locally.

key.name: remote-url
key.description: Base URL of the remote server (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8090). The service will call /v1/transcribe.

key.name: remote-api-key
key.description: Optional API key sent as X-Api-Key header to the remote server. Stored in GNOME settings (dconf).
